name: Sebin M Baby
title: Cloud & Linux Engineer
summary: Cloud & Linux Engineer with 4+ years of experience in AWS infrastructure, Linux administration, CI/CD, automation, monitoring, and production server support.
about: I work on reliable, secure, and scalable cloud infrastructure. My experience includes AWS services, Linux server administration, CI/CD pipelines, Bash scripting, monitoring, incident handling, hosting support, and infrastructure automation.
contactText: Open to Cloud, Linux, DevOps, and Infrastructure Engineer opportunities.

experience.description: Managed AWS-based Linux production infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, alerting, Bash automation, system hardening, incident response, and performance optimization.
Deployed and managed Linux cloud servers, WHM/cPanel hosting environments, CloudLinux servers, DNS, HTTP, FTP, SSH, TCP/IP, YUM/RPM, fdisk, and LVM.

projects.title: Enterprise Cloud Infrastructure
projects.description: AWS-based infrastructure for enterprise web applications using EC2, EBS, S3, VPC, IAM, Route 53, ELB, and CloudWatch.

projects.title: CI/CD Pipeline Automation
projects.description: Built and maintained deployment pipelines using Jenkins, AWS tools, Git, and Bash scripting to improve release reliability.

projects.title: Linux Hosting & Security
projects.description: Managed Apache, Nginx, PHP, MySQL, WHM/cPanel, SSL certificates, SSH hardening, firewalls, and server performance tuning.

projects.title: Server Monthly Security Patches
projects.description: A Bash automation tool that checks available security patches on Debian/Ubuntu servers, generates CSV reports, and automatically emails the results to administrators. Helps streamline monthly security compliance and patch management.
